arguments.final_answer:
Implemented ChunkedIterator using TDD:
- tests/test_chunked.rs — 6 tests covering exact chunks, partial last chunk, single-element, oversized, empty, and string types.
- src/chunked.rs — ChunkedIterator struct implementing Iterator<Item=Vec<T>>, plus Chunked extension trait providing .chunks(n) on all iterators. Blanket impl `impl<I: Iterator> Chunked for I {}`.
- src/lib.rs — added pub mod chunked.
All 6 tests pass.
